nasb.text: The perverse in heart are an abomination to the Lord, But the blameless in their walk are His delight.

esv.text: Those of crooked heart are an abomination to the Lord, but those of blameless ways are his delight.

cnv.text: 欺詐的心是耶和華厭惡的； 行為完全是他所喜悅的。

ccb.text: 心术不正的人令耶和华憎恶， 纯全无过的人蒙耶和华喜爱。

csbs.text: 心里歪邪的，为耶和华所憎恶； 行为纯全的，为他所悦纳。
